name: Bradley Nowell
title: Last known photo of Bradley Nowell, taken on May 25, 1996, after a concert — he was found dead the following morning.
description: Bradley Nowell, frontman of Sublime, was photographed on May 25, 1996, after performing at a concert in Petaluma, California. The following morning, his bandmate Bud Gaugh found Nowell dead in his hotel room at the Ocean View Motel in San Francisco. The cause of death was an accidental heroin overdose. Nowell's Dalmatian, Lou Dog, was found lying next to his body. He was 28 years old. Sublime's self-titled third album was released posthumously two months later and became a massive hit, going six-times platinum and producing the iconic single "What I Got".

lyrics.text:
Summertime, and the livin's easy
Bradley's on the microphone with Ras M.G.
All people in the dance will agree
That we're well-qualified to represent the L.B.C.
G, me and Louie, we gon' run to the party
Dance to the rhythm, it gets harder
(And we can do it like this, in the place to be)

bio: Bradley Nowell was the lead singer, guitarist, and frontman of the ska punk band Sublime. His distinctive voice and genre-blending style helped define the Southern California music scene of the 1990s.
